sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Costco stock barely moves after-hours as insider sale hits the tape ahead of key dates
feed.summary: Costco's shares saw minimal movement after an executive sold 1,500 shares. Investors are looking ahead to the shareholder meeting on January 15th and a sales update in early February for future market catalysts. The insider sale provides a minor signal amidst broader market turbulence and upcoming key company events.

feed.title: Ford Teams With Carhartt And Teases A Special Edition Super Duty
feed.summary: Ford and Carhartt have announced a partnership that will include workforce development, community initiatives, and product collaboration, kicking off with a special edition Super Duty truck. This 2027 model Super Duty Carhartt Edition will blend Ford's capability with Carhartt's durable workwear aesthetic, featuring design elements inspired by Carhartt's downtown Detroit store. The collaboration also includes a uniform program for Ford dealership technicians, providing Carhartt workwear.

feed.title: Janet Lee Sells 250 Shares of Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) Stock
feed.summary: Synopsys director Janet Lee recently sold 250 shares of the company's stock on January 12th for $132,500, reducing her direct holdings by 2.05%. This follows another sale of 250 shares on January 7th. Synopsys stock traded down 4.1% to $511.80, and the company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with $2.90 EPS and 37.8% revenue growth.

feed.title: Ford's quest to dominate the off-road market expands with Bronco RTR
feed.summary: Ford is expanding its presence in the booming off-road market with the introduction of the Bronco RTR, a new mid-tier performance vehicle expected in early 2027. This move follows Ford's successful strategy initiated with the F-150 Raptor in 2010, which led the company to capture 20% of off-road performance sales by 2025. The Bronco RTR aims to attract a younger demographic with its affordability and direct-from-factory availability, further solidifying Ford's position as a leader in the lucrative off-road segment.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Janet Lee Sells 250 Shares of Synopsys Inc (SNPS)
feed.summary: Janet Lee, General Counsel & Corporate Secretary at Synopsys Inc (SNPS), sold 250 shares of the company on January 12, 2026, bringing her total ownership to 11,959 shares. Over the past year, Lee has sold 500 shares in total, contributing to a pattern of 1 insider buy and 11 insider sells for Synopsys. Despite the insider selling, SNPS is considered modestly undervalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.86, trading at $530 against a GF Value of $613.26.

feed.title: Newmont Sets Date for Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results Release and Call
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation (AU:NEM) will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on February 19, 2026, in the U.S. (February 20 AEDT). This will be followed by a conference call and webcast for investors and analysts, providing stakeholders an opportunity to assess the company's performance and strategic progress. A recent analyst rating for Newmont stock is a Buy with an A$177.00 price target.

feed.title: Seagate Technology to Report Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on January 27, 2026
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc will announce its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results after the US market closes on Tuesday, January 27, 2026. An investment community conference call will follow at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET to discuss these results. A live audio webcast of the call will be available on Seagate’s Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation 2025 Sustainability Report Reflects Continued Commitment to Build a More Resilient, Agile, and Sustainable Future - PR Newswire APAC
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation published its 2025 Sustainability Report, highlighting its commitment to sustainability through technology and manufacturing. The report focuses on environmental, social, and governance areas, aiming to help customers achieve their sustainability goals while making its own operations more resilient and responsible. Rockwell Automation emphasizes that sustainability is a growth strategy, driving long-term value for stakeholders.

feed.title: Forged in Detroit: Ford and Carhartt Partner to Strengthen Essential Economy
feed.summary: Ford and Carhartt, both iconic American brands, have partnered to support the essential economy, focusing on skilled trades and those who work in demanding jobs. This collaboration highlights their shared values of durability, hard work, and community support. The initiative emphasizes strengthening industries vital to the nation's infrastructure and everyday functioning.

feed.title: Public Storage Stock: Steady Gains, Quiet Newsflow, And A Market Looking For Direction
feed.summary: Public Storage stock has shown steady upward momentum, reflecting a resilient profile despite market uncertainties and a quiet newsflow. The stock's performance over the past year highlights a balanced return for income-oriented investors, combining sturdy yield with steady appreciation. Analysts maintain a largely constructive but cautious view, positioning Public Storage as a quality REIT with moderate growth potential.

feed.title: Rio Tinto engages three banks to advise on potential Glencore acquisition, source says
feed.summary: Rio Tinto has hired JPMorgan, Evercore, and Macquarie to advise on a potential acquisition of Glencore, a deal that could create the world's largest miner valued at over $200 billion. The transaction reflects the ongoing consolidation in the mining industry as companies seek to secure metals essential for the energy transition and AI. While Rio Tinto has engaged advisers, Glencore has not yet formally retained its own, and previous merger discussions between the two giants in 2014 and late 2024 did not result in an agreement.

feed.title: Stop the Privatization of the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA)
feed.summary: The IAM Union is urging its members and the public to oppose renewed efforts to privatize the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA), a public institution providing affordable energy and union jobs. The union warns that privatization would lead to higher electricity rates, loss of union jobs, and reduced public accountability. They are calling on people to contact their Senators and Representatives to prevent the sale of TVA.

feed.title: How Global X Mlp & Energy Infrastructure Etf (MLPX) Affects Rotational Strategy Timing
feed.summary: This article analyzes the Global X MLP & Energy Infrastructure ETF (MLPX) using AI models to provide trading strategies. It highlights a neutral sentiment across all time horizons, suggesting sideways action, and identifies specific support and resistance levels. The analysis offers strategies for position trading, momentum breakouts, and risk hedging, emphasizing a wait-and-see approach due to a support test.

feed.title: (MITK) Movement Within Algorithmic Entry Frameworks
feed.summary: Stock Traders Daily provided an algorithmic analysis for Mitek Systems Inc. (MITK), highlighting a near-term strong sentiment with a neutral mid and long-term outlook. The analysis identified an exceptional short setup targeting 10.1% downside with minimal risk and outlined specific position, momentum, and risk hedging trading strategies based on AI models. It also offered multi-timeframe signal analysis, including support and resistance levels.

feed.title: The Truth About Intuit Inc.: Is This ‘Boring’ Stock Actually a Quiet Money Machine?
feed.summary: Intuit Inc. (INTU) is presented as a "quiet money machine" despite its seemingly "boring" products like TurboTax and QuickBooks, which are essential for personal finance and small businesses. The article highlights Intuit's strong financial performance, sticky ecosystem, and strategic growth into a comprehensive financial operating system, positioning it as a robust long-term investment. While acknowledging its premium valuation and regulatory scrutiny as potential risks, the analysis ultimately suggests Intuit is a "cop" for investors seeking stable, profitable software leaders.

feed.title: President Trump visits Ford pickup truck factory during Michigan trip
authors: AFP Via Getty Images; Evelyn Hockstein
feed.summary: President Donald Trump visited Michigan to tour the Ford River Rouge Complex in Dearborn and later address the Detroit Economic Club. The article showcases various photos of Trump interacting with Ford executives, including CEO Jim Farley and executive chairman Bill Ford, during his tour of the F-150 production facility. This visit highlights Trump's engagement with the automotive industry during his trip.

feed.title: A Look At Bank of New York Mellon Corporation’s Valuation After Its Earnings Beat And New Medium Term Targets
feed.summary: Bank of New York Mellon (BK) reported strong Q4 2025 results, exceeding revenue and profit consensus, and announced new medium-term targets and a dividend. While a narrative fair value suggests the stock is 3.7% undervalued at $127.67, Simply Wall St's DCF model indicates it's trading above its fair value estimate of $100.10. The article encourages investors to analyze the assumptions behind these valuations and offers tools to build custom narratives.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Applied Materials (AMAT) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Rally?
feed.summary: This article analyzes whether Applied Materials (AMAT) is still a good investment after its significant multi-year rally, using two valuation approaches. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is 118.2% overvalued, with an intrinsic value of US$139.71 per share compared to its market price of US$304.87. Additionally, its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 34.54x is slightly above Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 31.77x, also indicating it might be overvalued.

feed.title: Congressmen Sell Netflix Stock Ahead Of NFL Games, 'Stranger Things' Finale: Will They Miss Profits?
feed.summary: Two members of Congress, Rep. Gil Cisneros and Rep. Jonathan Jackson, sold their Netflix (NASDAQ: NFLX) stock in December, potentially missing out on significant gains. Their sales occurred before major catalysts like record-setting NFL games aired on Netflix and the release of the final parts of "Stranger Things" season five. Analysts are anticipating a strong fourth-quarter earnings report for Netflix, partly due to these events, and historically, January has been a favorable month for Netflix stock performance.

feed.title: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Stock Price Down 3% - What's Next?
feed.summary: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) shares dropped 3% during mid-day trading on Tuesday, with increased trading volume. Despite the dip, Wall Street sentiment remains largely positive, with several firms raising price targets and a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating. Corporate catalysts include an expanded edge AI offering and a cleared antitrust hurdle for a major acquisition, though analyst views on IBM's strategic direction are mixed.

feed.title: Rithm Capital (RITM) Launches $250M Preferred Stock Offering
feed.summary: Rithm Capital Corp. (RITM) has announced an underwritten public offering of 10 million shares of 8.750% Series F Fixed-Rate Reset Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock, aiming to raise roughly $250 million. The REIT, which focuses on real estate and financial services, will use the proceeds for investments and general corporate purposes. While the company exhibits strong net margins, it faces challenges with modest revenue growth and high leverage.

feed.title: Chinese firm Sinovac to supply vaccine to Chile ahead of flu season
feed.summary: Chinese biopharmaceutical firm Sinovac Biotech will supply 8.65 million doses of its influenza vaccine to the Chilean government for approximately US$14.7 million. This marks the second consecutive year Sinovac has provided the vaccine to Chile. The doses are expected in January, with an earlier-than-usual immunization campaign set for March to combat the H3N2 strain of influenza A circulating globally.

feed.title: UBS Raises Price Target for Nutrien (NTR) to $63, Maintains Neut
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Nutrien (NTR) to $63 from $58, while reaffirming a Neutral rating. This adjustment reflects a positive re-evaluation of Nutrien's market valuation by the analyst. Other firms have also recently updated their price targets for Nutrien, which is the world's largest fertilizer producer and a major agricultural retailer.

feed.title: Delta Quietly Changed How It Makes Money—and 2025 Proved It’s Working
feed.summary: Delta Airlines reported record full-year revenue for 2025, reaching $58.3 billion, a 2.3 percent increase year-over-year. This growth was driven by a strategic shift towards premium experiences, loyalty programs, and cargo, which now account for 60 percent of its total revenue, despite a decrease in economy ticket sales. The airline's success highlights a widening gap in the U.S. economy, as budget airlines face struggles while Delta thrives by catering to higher-income consumers.

feed.title: FFIV INVESTOR ALERT: Kirby McInerney LLP Reminds F5, Inc. Investors of Important Deadline in Class Action Lawsuit
feed.summary: Kirby McInerney LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a class action lawsuit against F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV). The lawsuit alleges that F5 made misleading statements about its cybersecurity capabilities while experiencing a significant security breach, which led to a stock price drop after the breach was revealed. Investors who suffered losses have until February 17, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status in the lawsuit.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean won't be going to this Caribbean island all year
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean has extended its suspension of cruise ship visits to Labadee, Haiti, through December 2026 due to escalating gang violence and a Level 4 "do not travel" advisory from the U.S. State Department. The cruise line last visited Labadee in the first quarter of 2025 and previously paused stops through April 2026. The decision is made out of an abundance of caution due to continued safety concerns in the country.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin delivers 350th MH-60R helicopter to U.S. Navy
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin has delivered its 350th MH-60R "Romeo" helicopter to the U.S. Navy, marking a significant milestone for the maritime strike aircraft. The helicopter was received by HSM-41, a fleet replacement squadron responsible for training new naval aviators for the Pacific fleet. This delivery reinforces the MH-60R's role as a leading anti-submarine warfare platform, critical for global ASW operations and recognized for its combat capabilities.

feed.title: Fifth Third and Comerica Announce Receipt of All Material Approvals to Combine
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp and Comerica Incorporated have received all material regulatory and shareholder approvals for their merger, which is expected to close on February 1, 2026. The combined entity will become the ninth-largest U.S. bank with $290 billion in assets, creating a stronger, more diversified financial institution. Both companies emphasize a smooth transition for customers and employees, with full system and brand conversions anticipated later in the year, and project significant financial benefits from the combination.

feed.title: Booking Holdings (BKNG) Dips More Than Broader Market: What You Should Know
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) shares fell by 1.42%, underperforming the broader market. Despite this, the company shows promising future growth, with anticipated EPS up 16.97% and revenue up 11.95% for the upcoming quarter. Analysts have moderately revised estimates upwards, contributing to Booking Holdings' current Zacks Rank of #2 (Buy).

feed.title: Pizzi, AerSale CIO, sells $13.5k in shares
feed.summary: Enrique Pizzi, AerSale's CIO, sold 1,825 shares for $13,466, a transaction made to cover tax obligations from vested restricted stock units. Despite this insider sale, management has been actively buying back shares, and the company maintains strong financial health. AerSale recently reported Q3 2025 results below expectations and experienced a warehouse fire at its Roswell facility, the impact of which is currently being evaluated.

feed.title: Configure domain controllers after Server 2025 upgrade
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive guide for configuring Active Directory domain controllers after upgrading to Windows Server 2025. It details essential post-upgrade tasks to enhance security and optimize the environment, covering configurations like enabling JET 32 KB page sizing, setting up account lockout policies, enforcing LDAP signing, deploying delegated Managed Service Accounts, and configuring Windows LAPS features. Additionally, it stresses the importance of ongoing monitoring and maintenance, including auditing authentication protocols and checking AD replication health.

feed.title: Is Pinnacle Financial Partners (PNFP) Pricing A Disconnect From Its Earnings Power?
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners (PNFP) appears undervalued according to Simply Wall St's analysis, with its stock trading significantly below its intrinsic value as calculated by the Excess Returns model. While its P/E ratio is slightly above the industry average, it screens as undervalued when compared to Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio. The article encourages investors to explore their own valuation narratives on platforms like Simply Wall St's Community.

feed.title: MLCI Stock Price and Chart — NASDAQ:MLCI
feed.summary: This article provides comprehensive financial data, news, and technical analysis for Mount Logan Capital Inc. (MLCI) traded on NASDAQ. It includes details on the company's stock price performance, key financial statistics like market capitalization and dividend yield, upcoming earnings reports, and analyst ratings. The article also features a Q&A section addressing common investor queries about MLCI's stock performance, forecasts, and financial details.

feed.title: The Walt Disney Company – Streaming turns profitable
feed.summary: Phillip Securities Research has initiated coverage of The Walt Disney Company with an "ACCUMULATE" rating and a target price of US$130.00. The report highlights Disney's diversified portfolio, strong intellectual property, and the successful profitability of its direct-to-consumer (DTC) streaming segment in 2H24. The Experiences segment is identified as the primary growth driver, showing consistent revenue growth and supported by resilient attendance.

feed.title: KHNP says will expand nuclear capacity factor to 15-yr high to meet growing demand
feed.summary: Korea Hydro & Nuclear Power Co. (KHNP) plans to increase the capacity factor of its nuclear power plants to 89% in 2026, the highest in 15 years, to lower electricity rates and meet growing demand from AI and semiconductor sectors. This includes resuming operation of the Kori-2 reactor after a 10-year life extension approval and pursuing extensions for other reactors. The company views nuclear power as a crucial supplement to intermittent renewable energy sources.

feed.title: Bank of America stock falls on Trump credit-card rate cap talk as CPI, earnings near
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) stock fell following reports of President Donald Trump's proposal to cap credit card interest rates at 10%. This news comes as major banks prepare for Q4 2025 earnings reports, with investors closely watching consumer credit outlook and the potential impact of rate caps on revenue streams. The broader financial sector also saw declines, while uncertainty about Federal Reserve rate cuts and upcoming CPI data further influenced market sentiment.

feed.title: Analyst Raises Halliburton (HAL) Price Target to $36
feed.summary: Susquehanna has raised its price target for Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) from $29 to $36, maintaining a 'Positive' rating, driven by better-than-expected US drilling and completions activity. The analyst suggests the revised target indicates an upside of over 10% from current levels. The company's stock has surged over 15% in early 2026, with investors anticipating its role in potentially reviving Venezuela's oil infrastructure, especially given Halliburton's past arbitration case against Venezuela.

feed.title: Fed Approves Fifth Third Bancorp Application
feed.summary: The Federal Reserve Board has approved Fifth Third Bancorp's application to acquire Comerica Incorporated. This acquisition means Fifth Third will gain indirect control of Comerica Bank and Comerica Bank & Trust, National Association. The move will expand Fifth Third's banking operations in Texas and Michigan.

feed.title: The 3 AI Infrastructure Stocks Set to Triple Over the Next 5 Years
feed.summary: The article identifies Nvidia (NVDA), Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), and Broadcom (AVGO) as three AI infrastructure stocks with the potential to triple in value over the next five years. It highlights their different approaches to the AI computing hardware market and the massive projected growth in data center capital expenditures. The author suggests that despite their already large market caps, the companies' strong growth projections and analyst bullishness make this triple an achievable goal.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation (NEM) Advances While Market Declines: Some Information for Investors
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation (NEM) closed up 1.48% in the latest trading session, outperforming the S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq, which all declined. The gold and copper miner has seen its shares gain 13.31% over the past month. Analysts expect Newmont to post strong earnings and revenue growth in its upcoming report, holding a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) and trading at a premium in valuation metrics compared to its industry.

feed.title: Is Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) Pricing Reflect Long Term Cash Flow Prospects At US$55.92?
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) is currently priced at US$55.92, which Simply Wall St considers undervalued based on two valuation approaches. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests a significant 56.3% discount, with an intrinsic value of about $127.94 per share. Additionally, the company's P/E ratio of 18.9x is below its proprietary "Fair Ratio" of 24.0x, further indicating undervaluation compared to its earnings profile and risks.

feed.title: Is Wider Rapiblyk Access Deepening McKesson’s Specialty Edge Or Just Incremental Volume For MCK?
feed.summary: AOP Health US, LLC has made its critical care drug Rapiblyk (landiolol) broadly available in the US through major distributors, including McKesson Corporation. This wider distribution reinforces McKesson's role in higher-value pharmaceutical distribution, aligning with its strategy to gain an edge in specialty and critical care therapies. While this move is incremental rather than a significant change, it supports McKesson's investment narrative focused on shifting volume and profit towards complex therapies with potentially higher margins.

feed.title: Radian Group (NYSE:RDN) Shares Down 6.2% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Radian Group (NYSE:RDN) shares were down 6.2% during mid-day trading on Tuesday, trading at $31.8150. Despite analysts being mixed on the stock with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $40.00, the company recently reported an EPS beat and offers an annualized dividend yield of 3.2%. Insider selling by EVP Eric Ray and various institutional investor activities were also noted.

feed.title: ISS recommends New Gold shareholders vote for Coeur Mining deal By Investing.com
feed.summary: Independent proxy advisory firm ISS recommends New Gold Inc. shareholders approve the acquisition by Coeur Mining, Inc., citing strategic soundness, operational synergies, and a stronger financial position for the combined entity. New Gold's Board unanimously supports the transaction, and the special meeting for shareholders is scheduled for January 27, 2026. This comes as Coeur Mining has shown strong market performance and expanded resources, while Moody's reviews both companies for potential rating upgrades post-merger.

feed.title: Jabil Opens Advanced Catheter Development Lab
feed.summary: Jabil has launched its Advanced Catheter Development Lab in St. Petersburg, FL, in collaboration with the University of Florida and the University of South Florida. This new facility aims to accelerate medical device development by integrating rapid prototyping with real-time testing capabilities. The lab features specialized equipment and automation technologies designed to reduce human error and streamline the transition from prototype to manufacturing, ultimately bringing advanced catheters to market faster.

feed.title: F5 launches major update with expanded API security, discovery
feed.summary: F5 has released version 7.0 of its Distributed Cloud Services platform, significantly enhancing API security, discovery, and networking capabilities for hybrid and multi-cloud environments. The update aims to unify control over APIs, extending discovery to various gateways and introducing improved bot defense and threat detection aligned with OWASP API Top 10. The company's Chief Product Officer, Kunal Anand, stated the goal is to "collapse complexity" for users managing bot defense, cloud-native operations, and connectivity.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories Buys the Farm, Sides with Monkey Extinction: PETA Statement
feed.summary: PETA released a statement criticizing Charles River Laboratories for acquiring a Cambodiam monkey breeding farm for $510 million. PETA argues this action contradicts Charles River's stated commitment to non-animal research methods, given the farm's association with unethical practices like falsified origin records and disease risks. PETA asserts that Charles River Laboratories is prioritizing profit over ethical science and the conservation of long-tailed macaques.

feed.title: Should Pfizer’s Oncology Win And Obesity Push Require Action From Pfizer (PFE) Investors?
feed.summary: Pfizer recently announced positive data from its BREAKWATER trial for BRAFTOVI® in BRAF V600E metastatic colorectal cancer and detailed an expanded obesity program following its Metsera acquisition. These developments aim to refresh Pfizer's growth amidst competitive and patent pressures on older products. While the oncology data is encouraging, the success of the obesity pipeline and cost management are considered more immediate drivers for the company's investment narrative.

feed.title: FirstEnergy to Webcast Fourth Quarter Earnings Teleconference
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after markets close on Tuesday, Feb. 17, 2026. Management will discuss these results in a conference call with financial analysts on Wednesday, Feb. 18, at 9 a.m. EST, followed by a Q&A session. Investors can listen to a live webcast and view presentation slides on FirstEnergy's Investor Information website.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To Western Union (WU) Launching USDPT And Accelerating On-Chain Payment Strategy
feed.summary: Western Union is accelerating its digital transformation by launching a US Dollar Payment Token (USDPT) on Solana and expanding digital transfer capabilities. This move aims to blend traditional remittances with emerging on-chain payment infrastructure and may significantly impact its investment narrative and long-term role in cross-border payments. The company's ability to scale these initiatives will determine if digital momentum can offset pressures in retail remittances and from fintech competitors.
